h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

scored.statedInsightEvidence: power shaped the record, and the cracks push back
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner was moving toward reluctantly accepting the two-pin discipline while still resisting the urge to make one grand label, so L3 continuing to acknowledge that urge and then submitting to the structure is exactly where the prior turns were pointing.
